description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.7-alpine Docker image and defines a single stage named test. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, first executing a before_script to install git via apk add --update --no-cache git and clean temporary files, then runs the script commands go get gitlab.com/kylehqcom/gojsonapi and go test. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required. The pipeline should simply run the test job on each pipeline execution.
